title: The Chilling Echo of Daryl Budenski

scenes.text: A man goes missing during a hiking trip, but why?
Daryl Budenski disappeared in the wilderness of California.
He vanished while hiking in 2015, with no sightings or evidence found.
His disappearance remains unexplained, leaving families with lingering questions.
scenes.label: CASE UNSOLVED

scenes.text: Follow if you can't stop asking why.

description: 📍 California, USA - 2015. Daryl Budenski disappeared during a hiking trip, with no trace left behind. Follow for daily mysteries!
